parsed_review.summary: CP00-678 (RP22 External Integrations I permission/audit binding tail + synthetic fixture boundary, Risk A, 10 units RP22.P04.M05.S17-RP22.P04.M06.S04) passes hardened read-only review with no findings. Source inspection via Read/Grep/Glob confirms the pack is descriptor-only, no-write, no-real-data, and runtime-closed. registry.js EXTERNAL_INTEGRATIONS_I_CP678_PACK_BINDING/REQUIREMENTS (1991-2060), service.js freezeCp678Result (436-449) and createExternalIntegrationsICp678PermissionAuditFixtureBoundaryDescriptor + Hermes/Claude/handoff factories (2641-2703), and validators.js validateExternalIntegrationsICp678Coverage (680-701) / validateExternalIntegrationsICp678PermissionAuditFixtureBoundaryDescriptor (1555-1593) are internally consistent and enforce synthetic_only=true, no_real_data=true, descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, raw_payload_included=false, unauthorized_count_included=false, golden_case_payload_included=false, and all external-api/oauth/sync/credential/permission/audit/UI/Hermes/fixture/test/persistence runtime boundaries=false; no fs/network/child_process/process.env usage exists in packages/integrations-core/src. Coverage matches the baseline and prompt exactly (test:1, hermes_evidence:1, claude_review:1, implementation:3, ui:4 = 10; Permission And Audit Binding:6 / Synthetic Fixture Set:4; RP22.P04:10, M05:6, M06:4; first RP22.P04.M05.S17, last RP22.P04.M06.S04). model.test.js asserts CP678 coverage (336-346) and descriptor no-runtime behavior (613-633): pack_id CP00-678, descriptor-only flags, unauthorized_count_included=false, ui/external-api runtime closed, Hermes runtime_receipt_emitted=false, Claude read_only=true and promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, and handoff to CP00-679 / RP22.P04.M06.S05; the projection test (635-663) confirms both contract files project CP00-678 as current_pack, pass validateExternalIntegrationsICoreContractProjection, and deep-equal cp678_requirements and cp678_no_write_attestation. Both contract files carry generated_from_pack_id/current_pack CP00-678 (integrations-core-contract.json 69-84; external-integrations-i-contract.json 3, 25003+), and scripts/validate-rp22-external-integrations-i-contract.mjs rebuilds the projection and compares it to the committed contracts read-only (writes gated behind --write). Authority boundary holds: Claude is a read-only independent reviewer and not final approver (descriptor authority_boundary claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; claude_packet read_only=true), and Hermes is used only as a deterministic control-plane review-packet/receipt pattern (hermes_runtime_opened=false, runtime_receipt_emitted=false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, command_result pending_until_closeout_pack_validation) — not product runtime. Evidence is honest and not over-claimed: manifest, adjudication, and construction-inspection report production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status in_progress, pending exactly one valid hardened review; the production_ready_flag external_integrations_i_permission_audit_fixture_boundary_descriptor_verified is correctly gated on this review. Provenance note: command-evidence records 22/22 validation commands at exit 0 with writes_product_state=false and no_real_data=true, and readiness auth_preflight passed (exit 0, 1432-byte valid-JSON stdout, no 0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped/auth-failure evidence) — these were statically inspected from the evidence artifacts, not independently re-executed in this read-only review. No prior invalid review attempts exist (invalid_review_attempts=[]; no raw-output.json/review-receipt.json present yet — this is the first and only review). The changed-file scope is correct: active refs are the integrations-core package, both contracts, the RP22 validator, and the cp00-678 docs, while unrelated dirty/untracked files (closeout-pack-plan/next-pack-queue, new-session-handoff, LDIP results, workbook matter docs, progress-control-room) are preserved and not inferred into the pack (active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted=[]). This PASS receipt does not constitute final human/enterprise-trust approval, which remains outside this receipt and is not claimed by the pack; blocks_goal_closeout is false for this CP closeout goal only.
